prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约7221→8227→7323名，2024年明显后移后2025年有所回升，2025年基准约7323名；本省理科计划2023年60人，2024年 61人，2025年61人；2026年计划41人，较2025年大幅缩招约32.8%，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第83名，近年排名 稳定在74–85名区间；2024年声誉偏负面（陕西文科招生分数线骤降），2026年声誉偏负面（师德师风相关舆情）；抖音热度较热（总排名第51位），短视频曝 光处于中等偏上水平，报考关注度一般；风景园林学A+（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力；但A-及以上学科仅此1个，学 科覆盖面较窄。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热/推荐，与该校招生专业匹配度高；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（含不 确定标注），较2025年分科合计约7.65万人大幅增加，竞争加剧；北京林业大学位于北京市，对新疆考生具有地域吸引力；该校在新疆理科招生计划占比较小，近年约60人左右，2026年缩至41人。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7323名、2026年理科计划大幅缩招32.8%（使位次前移）、本省 考生总数明显增加（使竞争加剧）及声誉偏负面等多重因素，但考生规模扩大形成对冲。预测2026年理科最低位次约5933名，区间5433–6433名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5433–6433名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<5433名）可重点冲刺计算机类、电气工程等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（>6433名）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中风景园林（A+学科）等特色专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum science ranking was approximately 7221 → 8227 → 7323, with a notable backward shift in 2024 followed by a recovery in 2025, and a baseline of about 7323 in 2025; the provincial science enrollment plan was 60 in 2023, 61 in 2024, and 61 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 41, a significant reduction of about 32.8% compared to 2025, leading to a notable easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 83rd in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 74–85 range; reputation was somewhat negative in 2024 (sharp drop in liberal arts admission scores in Shaanxi), and somewhat negative in 2026 (related to teacher ethics and style public opinion); Douyin popularity is relatively hot (51st overall), short video exposure is at a medium-high level, and application attention is average; Landscape Architecture is A+ (top nationally), highly consistent with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, offering some appeal for related majors; but only one discipline is A- or above, indicating a narrow disciplinary coverage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity/recommendation, with high matching to the university's enrollment majors; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000 (including uncertain markings), a significant increase compared to the total of about 76,500 by subject in 2025, intensifying competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, offering regional appeal to Xinjiang examinees; the university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang is relatively small, around 60 in recent years, reduced to 41 in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7323, the significant reduction of 32.8% in the 2026 science plan (which moves the ranking forward), the notable increase in the total number of examinees in the province (which intensifies competition), and the somewhat negative reputation, among multiple factors, but the expansion of the examinee pool creates a counterbalance. The predicted minimum science ranking for 2026 is approximately 5933, with a range of 5433–6433.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Digital Media Technology, Data Science)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Landscape Architecture
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Automation
- Finance
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Forestry (Forestry, Forest Protection, Economic Forest)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Forestry Engineering
- Soil and Water Conservation and Desertification Control
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5433–6433, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<5433), focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>6433), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also considering Tier 2 majors such as Landscape Architecture (A+ discipline) and other distinctive programs.

The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 15 students each year from 2023 to 2025; in 2026, the plan is 11 students, a reduction of about 26.7% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation was slightly negative in 2024 (sharp drop in liberal arts admission scores in Shaanxi), and slightly negative in 2026 (related to teacher ethics and conduct incidents); Douyin popularity is hot, but application attention is average; Landscape Architecture is rated A+ (top nationally), but has low relevance to liberal arts majors; liberal arts majors lack A- or higher discipline evaluation support.

专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature are socially recommended/hot, suitable for liberal arts students; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, offering geographical appeal to Xinjiang liberal arts examinees; the liberal arts enrollment plan is small (11–15 students), with stable but slightly shrinking enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1264, the 26.7% reduction in the 2026 liberal arts plan (which shifts the ranking forward), the significant increase in the number of provincial examinees (which intensifies competition), and the slightly negative reputation, but with the increase in examinee scale partially offsetting.
